A Note From The Founder

Hi, I’m Michael.

After serving my country as a veteran of the United States Marine Corps and later as a former federal employee, I wanted to continue serving my community by helping people reclaim their homes, garages, businesses, and properties.

Whether you need a single item removed or a full property cleanout, my goal is simple: show up on time, work hard, and complete the mission.

Read My Full Story →
Our Services

Junk Removal & Cleanouts

Furniture Removal

Couches, recliners, tables, dressers, desks, chairs, mattresses, and more.

Appliance Removal

Washers, dryers, stoves, refrigerators, freezers, AC units, and small appliances.

Garage Cleanouts

Boxes, tools, old furniture, shelves, bags, and years of clutter cleared fast.

Estate Cleanouts

Respectful cleanout support for families, realtors, and property managers.

Yard Waste

Brush, branches, storm debris, fencing, lumber, and outdoor clutter.

Construction Debris

Light renovation debris, drywall, wood, cabinets, flooring, and jobsite clutter.

Ready to reclaim your space?

From your first phone call to the final sweep, Sergeant’s Got Your Six™.
